cells.details: PlainJsonProvider (agent card source-of-truth, GLEIF check); signer factory threw: [messaging] SIGNING_MODE=vlei requested but VleiSignifySigner is not yet implemented (Phase 2 / iteration 14). Use SIGNING_MODE=plain for May 19 MVP.

VleiProvider (api-server DEEP-EXT script; not invoked in smoke run); signer factory threw: [messaging] SIGNING_MODE=vlei requested but VleiSignifySigner is not yet implemented (Phase 2 / iteration 14). Use SIGNING_MODE=plain for May 19 MVP.
PlainJsonProvider (agent card source-of-truth, GLEIF check); plain signer initialised (kind=hash-envelope)
VleiProvider (api-server DEEP-EXT script; not invoked in smoke run); plain signer initialised (kind=hash-envelope)

notes: Smoke run: factories are imported and asked to initialise, but no agents are started and no api-server is required.

The signer factory uses a singleton cache; cells are tested in order [plain/vlei, vlei/vlei, plain/plain, vlei/plain] so the throws happen on a cold cache and the supported cells populate it afterward.
If you see 'unexpected-success' for a vlei-signing cell, that means a previous cell already cached a plain signer; the factory does still throw on a cold start — verify by running this script alone.
